app.title: MSG Viewer
welcome.title: .msg file viewer
png.target.title: Export to PNG
png.target.body: How do you want to export the message image?
attachments.title: Attachments
png.tooTall.title: Message is too long
png.tooTall.body: The content is {h} px tall and the PNG limit is {max} px. You can export truncated, or use PDF for long emails.
error.title: Could not open file
error.not-found: The file does not exist or cannot be read.
error.not-cfbf: Not an Outlook message: no CFBF structure found (renamed extension?).
error.truncated: The file is incomplete or truncated and cannot be read.
error.encrypted: The message is S/MIME encrypted and its content cannot be displayed.
error.unsupported-class: Unsupported Outlook item type: {detail}. Only email messages are supported.
error.too-large: The file exceeds the maximum supported size.
error.parse-error: The file could not be interpreted as an Outlook message.
header.subject: Subject
actions.copy: Copy the selection with formatting (or the whole body if nothing is selected)
toast.bodyEmpty: The message has no content to copy
unlink.title: Disable links in this message
unlink.body: For your safety, all links in this message will be disabled to protect you from phishing or malware. You can re-enable them with the same button.
